=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (22:3-22:8) TS377019: This `yield* Effect.fail(...)` passes a yieldable error value. `yield*` represents that value directly without wrapping it in `Effect.fail`. effect(unnecessaryFailYieldableError)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryFailYieldableError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryFailYieldableError for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace yield* Effect.fail with yield*"

[D2] (23:3-23:8) TS377019: This `yield* Effect.fail(...)` passes a yieldable error value. `yield*` represents that value directly without wrapping it in `Effect.fail`. effect(unnecessaryFailYieldableError)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryFailYieldableError for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryFailYieldableError for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace yield* Effect.fail with yield*"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryFailYieldableError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryFailYieldableError for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace yield* Effect.fail with yield*" ===

--- file:///.src/unnecessaryFailYieldableError.ts ---
/** @effect-diagnostics missingReturnYieldStar:skip-file */
import * as Data from "effect/Data"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

class NonYieldable extends Error {
  readonly _tag = "NonYieldable"
}

class DataTaggedError extends Data.TaggedError("DataTaggedError")<{}> {}

class SchemaError extends Schema.ErrorClass<SchemaError>("SchemaError")({
  _tag: Schema.tag("SchemaError")
}) {}

export const unnecessaryFailYieldableError = Effect.gen(function*() {
  // should not report
  yield* Effect.fail(new NonYieldable("non-yieldable error"))
  const err = new DataTaggedError()
  console.log(err)
  // should report
  yield*new DataTaggedError()
  yield* Effect.fail(new SchemaError({}))
})

// should not report
export const shouldNotReport = Effect.fail(new DataTaggedError())


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryFailYieldableError for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryFailYieldableError for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace yield* Effect.fail with yield*" ===

--- file:///.src/unnecessaryFailYieldableError.ts ---
/** @effect-diagnostics missingReturnYieldStar:skip-file */
import * as Data from "effect/Data"
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"

class NonYieldable extends Error {
  readonly _tag = "NonYieldable"
}

class DataTaggedError extends Data.TaggedError("DataTaggedError")<{}> {}

class SchemaError extends Schema.ErrorClass<SchemaError>("SchemaError")({
  _tag: Schema.tag("SchemaError")
}) {}

export const unnecessaryFailYieldableError = Effect.gen(function*() {
  // should not report
  yield* Effect.fail(new NonYieldable("non-yieldable error"))
  const err = new DataTaggedError()
  console.log(err)
  // should report
  yield* Effect.fail(new DataTaggedError())
  yield*new SchemaError({})
})

// should not report
export const shouldNotReport = Effect.fail(new DataTaggedError())
